description: Well-structured JWT auth issue with context, AC, and constraints

issue.title: Add JWT authentication to the API
issue.context: The API currently has no authentication. We need JWT-based auth so the frontend can make authenticated requests. This is blocking the user management features scheduled for next sprint.
acceptance_criteria: POST /auth/register accepts email+password, returns 201 with JWT
POST /auth/login verifies credentials, returns 200 with JWT
constraints: Use argon2 for password hashing, not bcrypt
Don't modify the existing User schema - add a separate Credential model
JWT secret must be loaded from environment variable
